summary: Completed testing of Iteration 101 features: WebSocket Service, Enhanced Mock Notifications, Xplan Phase 2, Live Sync Dashboard, and Save to Client Profile buttons. Backend: 18/18 tests passed. Frontend: Live Sync Dashboard working with WebSocket connection, auto-refresh, and 4 tabs. Retirement Calculator has Save to Client Profile button visible. Minor React warning about duplicate keys in Live Sync Dashboard.

issues: React warning: Encountered two children with the same key - duplicate keys in Live Event Stream list items
